rationale: No new developments directly affecting Romania this cycle; Iran deal continuation keeps energy price uncertainty alive, and migration protests in Italy are a mild regional signal.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: Unresolved Iran deal keeps energy market uncertainty elevated, with indirect effects on Romanian energy costs and EU economic stability.

top_events.title: Thousands rally in Rome for rival pro- and anti-migration marches
top_events.summary: EU migration tensions visible in Italy; Romania, as a transit and source country, monitors EU migration policy shifts closely.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues without escalation
top_events.summary: War near Romania's border persists at background level with no new qualitative change this cycle.
